title: feat: add p0 support event contract v2 validator
goal: Add a local Support Event Contract v2 validator and prove admin reaction dispatch preview aligns with it without claiming runtime readiness.
allowedScope: Support Event Contract v2 local validator
doneCriteria: validator accepts valid reaction dispatch preview
admin reaction dispatch preview returns valid contract_validation
securityBoundaries: No DB driver, Redis, or Kafka dependency is added.
No real DB connection is introduced.
No migration is changed or executed.
No real YouTube API or OAuth token is used.
No real TTS, Live2D, renderer, OBS, or WebSocket delivery is performed.
No reaction, overlay, or outbox side effects are enqueued.
No RPC, wallet, deploy, contracts, workflows, web, or overlay app changes.
Validator rejects raw messages, raw payload markers, wallet addresses, authorization strings, stdout, stderr, jobs_url, and logs_url.
No runtime, production, legal, or YouTube policy readiness is claimed.
residualRisks: This is a local validator and preview alignment only.
Durable contract enforcement and external execution adapters remain future scoped work.
humanConfirmation: AI review is not human approval.
AI review is not GitHub approval review.
This PR does not create owner approval record.
This PR does not create merge authority.
productVerificationCommands: cd contracts && forge test || true: unavailable_nonblocking

packageVerification.verification: No package scripts, runtime dependencies, DB driver dependency, Redis/Kafka dependency, package.json, or pnpm-lock changes are introduced.

apiCompatibilitySummary.statement: Adds local/internal contract validation metadata to admin reaction dispatch preview.

runtimeSmokeRationale: No runtime readiness is claimed; this is local contract validation and admin preview alignment only.
rollbackOrStopCondition: Stop if package.json, pnpm-lock, contracts, migrations, workflows, scripts, apps/web, apps/overlay, real YouTube API, real OAuth, real RPC, real DB, DB driver dependency, Redis/Kafka dependency, wallet/RPC/deploy changes, real TTS/Live2D/renderer/OBS/WebSocket delivery, support event mutation, reaction/overlay/outbox enqueue, or readiness/compliance claims are introduced.

reviewScope.scope: P0 Support Event Contract v2 validator, reaction dispatch preview alignment, tests, docs, and .codex evidence.
reviewScope.riskSummary: Main risk is accepting unsafe output, non-skipped side effects, or misleading readiness claims; validator tests reject those outcomes.
reviewScope.verificationOracle: Validator tests, preview alignment tests, full repository tests, evidence checks, quality self-protection, secret scan, and GitHub same-head checks.
